F0800K Staff Assessment: Lock Item Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers having a place to lock their personal belongings. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
208 F0800L_STF_READG_AVLBL_CD F0800L_STF_READG_AVLBL_CD F0800L Staff Assessment: Reading Materials Available Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers reading books, magazines or newspapers. -=Not assessed/no
